## Summary

<!-- A one-paragraph description of what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes a defect)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation / chore / refactor (no user-visible behaviour change)

## How has this been tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran and the migration scenario you validated (if any).
     If you ran an actual migration, mention counts (e.g. "1 500 liked tracks, 40 playlists"). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes locally.
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes locally.
- [ ] Public behaviour is documented in the README where applicable.
- [ ] The `CHANGELOG.md` has an entry under *Unreleased*.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens or real account identifiers are included in the diff.
